ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* Name of the TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "college" TEXT /* Player's college (if applicable) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the current contract started */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the current contract ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status (e.g., Healthy, Injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the stats are recorded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which the stats are recorded */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the team during the game */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the team during the game */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of field goal attempts by the team during the game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team during the game */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the team during the game */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of three-point attempts by the team during the game */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the team during the game */,
  "two_pointers" INTEGER /* Number of two-pointers made by the team during the game */,
  "two_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of two-point attempts by the team during the game */,
  "two_point_percentage" REAL /* Two-point percentage of the team during the game */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the team during the game */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of free throw attempts by the team during the game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the team during the game */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds by the team during the game */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds by the team during the game */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds by the team during the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team during the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team during the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team during the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the team during the game */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls by the team during the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the team during the game */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points per game for the team */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Team's rank at the time of the game */,
  "opponent_team_rank" INTEGER /* Opponent's rank at the time of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "winning_margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory or defeat */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the team */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season for which the ranking is calculated */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Performance metric used for ranking (e.g., points per game, rebounds per game) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division in which the team plays */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference in which the team plays */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was calculated */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous ranking position */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in ranking position from the previous rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., viewed dashboard, downloaded report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
